message:
fix: add state.json to crew workspace gitignore patterns

Crew workspaces have a state.json file for worker metadata that shows up
as untracked in git status. Added to EnsureGitignorePatterns.

Cherry-picked from PR #2521.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
